title: `issue update` and partition move through the helper
description: Extend the helper and CLI with `to-execution issue update`: update any field except the immutable `id`, including status flips and moving an issue between partitions (backlog ↔ `sprint-<N>/`) by relocating its per-file record — location remains the lifecycle state. Reject any attempt to change the `id`.
acceptance_criteria: `to-execution issue update <id> --status ...` flips status and rewrites the file canonically
The `id` field is immutable; an update that tries to change it is rejected
Moving an issue into a sprint relocates its `<uuid>-<slug>.json` file to `.excn/issues/sprint-<N>/` (location-as-state preserved)
Other fields (assigned_sprint, notes, etc.) update without rewriting siblings
Update path reuses the helper's canonical serialization and atomic write
